creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thierry Thomas from comment #6)
> It comes with 3 license files:
> - license-fi.txt
> - license-gplv2.txt
> - license-gplv3.txt

Khmm, so, what should the LICENSE-line be?

> `make regression-test' core dumps

I haven't seen this -- not amd64, not on i386... Which platform were you using? Could you build WITH_DEBUG=yes and try to obtain the stack?

Also, are you sure, you've been using the latest version of the upgrade -- one with additional patches?

Thanks!
